text: You think you're a morning person but can't even get to the gym on time. Discipline isn't about being perfect, it's about being consistent. I've been back at the gym for a week and it's a struggle, but every rep counts
decision_reason: Targets cold audience with a tough-love tone and identity threat trigger to grab attention

text: I woke up at 5:30am, struggled to get out of bed, but made it to the gym. That's what discipline looks like. Not the perfect workout, but the imperfect habit that gets you closer to your dreams
decision_reason: Shares a personal story to connect with the audience and highlight the importance of discipline

text: Discipline is not about being motivated, it's about being consistent. 'The only bad workout is the one that didn't happen'
decision_reason: Uses a quote to reframe the audience's perspective on discipline and motivation
